member.name: E:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Bindings.IBindingRegistryProvider.BindingRegistryChanged
member.summary: Raised on any thread when the registry is replaced. The bool argument is for a full registry replacement (connector/reflection discovery) and for an incremental Roslyn per-file patch. Implementations only raise this for a Roslyn patch when it actually changed a binding's matched expression -- a patch that didn't (e.g. a method-body edit) raises nothing, since there would be no feature-file match to recompute.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Bindings.ProjectBindingRegistry.ReplaceBindings(Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Bindings.CSharpStepDefinitionFile)
member.summary: Replaces all step definitions and hooks originating from the given C# source file with freshly discovered ones, leaving bindings from other files untouched. This is the per-file replacement used by Roslyn/C# source-level binding discovery.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Bindings.ProjectBindingRegistry.HasExpressionChanges(Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Bindings.ProjectBindingRegistry,Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Bindings.ProjectBindingRegistry,System.String)
member.summary: Compares the step-definition expressions for between and , keyed by (StepDefinitionType, Method, ParameterTypes) rather than source line -- an edit elsewhere in the file shifts line numbers without changing binding identity, and line number is deliberately excluded from this comparison. Returns if a binding for this file was added, removed, or had its matched expression change; edits to method bodies, comments, or anything else that doesn't touch a step's matched expression report no change.
member.remarks: A method can carry multiple attributes of the same step type with the same parameter types but different expression text (e.g. two [When(...)] on one method), which collapse to the same key. Bindings are therefore grouped by key and compared as a sorted multiset of expressions per key, rather than a single expression per key.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Bindings.ProjectBindingRegistry.IsSameSourceFile(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Compares two source-file paths for identity. The comparison normalizes the paths and is case-insensitive: the reflection connector records source paths from the PDB (often with an upper-case drive letter), while Roslyn discovery derives them from an LSP document URI (which can carry a lower-case drive letter). A case-sensitive compare would treat those as different files and fail to replace a file's previous bindings, leaving a stale binding behind.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Bindings.ProjectBindingRegistry.FindBindingAtLocation(Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Documents.SourceLocation)
member.summary: Finds the first step-definition binding whose source location covers (same file, line within leeway — see ). Returns when no binding matches.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Diagnostics.IDiagnosticsAggregator
member.summary: Combines parse-error tags and binding-mismatch data into a single, ordered list of items ready for conversion to LSP Diagnostic objects.
member.remarks: The LSP specification requires that a single textDocument/publishDiagnostics message delivers the complete diagnostic set for a URI; a partial message clears any diagnostics not included in it. This aggregator is therefore the single point of truth for what gets pushed — callers must not supplement or filter its output.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.FindUnusedStepDefs.FindUnusedStepDefinitionsService
member.summary:
Implements the scan behind the custom reqnroll/findUnusedStepDefinitions request.
Scans all supplied project binding registries and returns one row per unused binding expression. A C# method decorated with multiple step attributes produces multiple objects; each expression is checked independently — used expressions are omitted, unused ones each produce a row.
Uses with no project filter (intersection semantics: an expression is considered used if any project's feature files reference it). A per-location cache avoids redundant match-set scans for multi-expression methods. Bindings with the same (file, line, expression) in multiple registries are deduplicated.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.FindUnusedStepDefs.FindUnusedStepDefinitionsService.#ctor(Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Matching.IBindingMatchService,Reqnroll.IdeSupport.Common.Logging.IIdeSupportLogger)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.FindUnusedStepDefs.FindUnusedStepDefinitionsService.FindUnusedStepDefinitions(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{System.String,Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Bindings.ProjectBindingRegistry}})
member.remarks:
A C# method may carry multiple step attributes ([Given("A")][When("B")]). Each attribute is a separate with its own Expression. The method produces one FAR row per UNUSED expression — so a method with one used and one unused expression yields a single row (the unused one). A method all of whose expressions are used produces no rows; a method none of whose expressions are used produces one row per expression.
Cross-project deduplication: the same source file linked into multiple project registries would produce duplicate rows for the same expression; these are suppressed by the seen set.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.FindUnusedStepDefs.FindUnusedStepDefinitionsService.ParseMethod(System.String)
member.summary:
Parses ClassName and MethodName from the stored Method string.
Connector path: "ClassName.MethodName(paramType1, paramType2)"
Roslyn path: "Namespace.ClassName.MethodName"
In both cases: strip params, split on ., last segment = MethodName, second-to-last = ClassName.

member.summary: Finds step definitions that have no matching step anywhere in the workspace's feature files.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.FindUnusedStepDefs.IFindUnusedStepDefinitionsService.FindUnusedStepDefinitions(System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.ValueTuple{System.String,Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Bindings.ProjectBindingRegistry}})
member.summary: Scans every supplied project's binding registry and returns one per step-definition binding expression with zero matching steps across the workspace.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Folding.GherkinFoldingRangeService
member.summary: Walks the DeveroomTag tree to produce foldable region ranges (Code Folding). Folding ranges are computed for: - Feature blocks (body only, after the keyword line) - Scenario / Scenario Outline / Background blocks - Rule blocks - Doc strings - Data tables - Examples blocks

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Matching.FeatureBindingMatchSet.FromTags(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Int32,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Parsing.Gherkin.DeveroomTag},Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Matching.ProjectOwner)
member.summary: Builds a match set from the flattened tag collection produced by DeveroomTagParser. Each / / tag carries the step text span as its range and the computed as its data; this method projects those into entries.
member.remarks: A single step can emit both a DefinedStep and an UndefinedStep tag (e.g. a scenario outline whose example rows partly match), but both reference the same at the same span; such duplicates are collapsed so the set holds one entry per step.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Matching.IBindingMatchService
member.summary: Cache of step binding matches keyed by (document URI + owning project), plus a reverse index from binding source locations back to the feature steps that resolve to them.
member.remarks: The cache is populated whenever a feature document is (re)parsed (see GherkinDocumentTaggerService) and invalidated when the binding registry changes. A shared/linked feature file may have one entry per owning project; present the primary owner's entry for rendering (semantic tokens, diagnostics).

member.summary: Returns every cached feature step that resolves to a binding at . Pass to restrict results to specific owning projects; pass to search across all projects. entries are always included regardless of the filter (they are pre-baseline placeholders that are visible to all callers). Backs Find Usages and the Code Lens usage counts.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Matching.StepBindingMatch
member.summary: A single feature-file step's resolved binding match, together with the text span the step occupies in the feature document. This is the per-(featureURI, range) coordinate of the binding match cache described in section 3 of the LSP IDE Support design.
member.remarks: Match computation still happens in DeveroomTagParser while it walks the document (it has the snapshot for span math and the tag tree for IGherkinDocumentContext. A captures the result of that computation so downstream features — Go to Step Definition, diagnostics (undefined-step/binding diagnostics), find usages — can query it without re-parsing.

member.summary: Gets or sets the is ambiguous.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Matching.StepBindingMatch.Contains(System.Int32)
member.summary: True when (absolute char offset) falls anywhere on the step's line(s) — not just within the step text span. Gherkin is line-oriented, so a click on the keyword, leading indentation, trailing whitespace, or just past the last character should still resolve to the step; this is what lets Go to Step Definition match on the whole line.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Matching.StepBindingMatch.Keyword

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Matching.StepBindingMatch.ScenarioName

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Matching.StepBindingMatch.ProjectName
member.summary: The short project name derived from ProjectOwner.ProjectFile at cache-build time (e.g. "Minimal", "Minimalnet481"). when the owner was unknown at cache-build time.

member.name: P:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Matching.StepBindingMatch.BindingLocations
member.summary: The source locations of every binding this step resolves to — one for a unique match, several for an ambiguous match, none for an undefined step.

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Parsing.CSharp.StepDefinitionFileParser
member.summary: Roslyn/C# source-level binding discovery. Scans a single C# syntax tree for Reqnroll step-definition and hook attributes and produces the corresponding / instances. Discovery is syntax-only — no compilation or build is required — so it can run immediately as the user edits a .cs file.

member.name: F:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Parsing.CSharp.StepDefinitionFileParser.CucumberParamPattern
member.summary: Matches a Cucumber {paramType} placeholder where the parameter name is a simple word identifier. Used to convert Cucumber expressions to regex before matching.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Parsing.CSharp.StepDefinitionFileParser.Parse(Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Bindings.CSharpStepDefinitionFile)
member.summary: Discovers only the step-definition bindings in the file. Retained for backwards compatibility; prefer to also obtain hooks.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Parsing.CSharp.StepDefinitionFileParser.ParseBindings(Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Bindings.CSharpStepDefinitionFile)
member.summary: Discovers all bindings (step definitions and hooks) declared in the file.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Parsing.CSharp.StepDefinitionFileParser.BuildRegex(System.String)
member.summary: Converts a Reqnroll step-definition expression to a compiled . The expression may be a plain regex or a Cucumber expression that uses {paramType} placeholders. Standard Cucumber parameter types are converted to their canonical regex patterns; unknown/custom types (e.g. project-defined step-argument transformations like {Verb}) fall back to (.*) so the binding can still match its steps even though the precise regex is not statically derivable without a semantic model. For plain-regex expressions the substitution is a no-op (no {...} present).

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Parsing.CSharp.StepDefinitionFileParser.GetAttributeName(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Syntax.AttributeSyntax)
member.summary: Returns the attribute's simple name with any namespace qualification and the conventional Attribute suffix removed (e.g. Reqnroll.GivenAttribute -> Given).

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Parsing.CSharp.StepDefinitionFileParser.GetStepDefinitionExpression(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Syntax.AttributeSyntax)
member.summary: Extracts the step-text expression: the explicit Expression = "..." named argument if present, otherwise the first positional string-literal argument. Returns null when no literal expression can be determined statically.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Parsing.CSharp.StepDefinitionFileParser.GetStringConstant(Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Syntax.ExpressionSyntax)
member.summary: Returns the compile-time string value of a string-literal expression (regular or verbatim), or null for anything that cannot be evaluated by syntax alone (nameof, concatenation, etc.).

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Parsing.CSharp.StepDefinitionFileParser.CombineScopes(Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Parsing.CSharp.StepDefinitionFileParser.RawScope,Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Parsing.CSharp.StepDefinitionFileParser.RawScope)
member.summary: Combines the type-level and method-level [Scope] attributes. A binding is in scope only when both levels match, so their tags are AND-combined; the more specific method-level feature/scenario title wins.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Parsing.CSharp.StepDefinitionFileParser.CombineWithHookTags(Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Parsing.CSharp.StepDefinitionFileParser.RawScope,System.Collections.Generic.IReadOnlyList{System.String})
member.summary: A hook applies when the scenario is within the method/type scope and carries one of the tags listed on the hook attribute. The hook's tags are OR-combined and then AND-combined with the surrounding [Scope].

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Parsing.CSharp.StepDefinitionFileParser.AttributeStringInfo
member.summary: Information about a string literal token in a binding attribute argument — its source span, syntax kind (regular string or raw string), and raw source text.

member.summary: Locates the string-literal argument of a binding attribute at the given source position and attribute index, and returns information about its token. Returns null when the argument is not a literal string expression (e.g. a constant reference or nameof).

member.name: T:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Rename.FeatureStepTextBuilder
member.summary:
Builds feature-step replacement text that preserves the original parameter content when a binding expression is renamed.
Two strategies are applied, in order:
Regex injection. Match the old binding regex against the original step text to extract captured parameter values, then inject them into the parameter slots of the new expression. This handles concrete values (e.g. 50).
Static-segment substitution. When the regex does not match — e.g. the step uses a Scenario Outline placeholder such as <secondNumber> that is not a numeric value — replace the old expression's literal segments with the new expression's literal segments, leaving whatever sits in the parameter position untouched. This keeps placeholders and other non-matching parameter content intact instead of leaking the binding's {int} token into the feature file.
If neither strategy applies, returns the new expression unchanged.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Rename.FeatureStepTextBuilder.Build(System.String,System.String,System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex,System.String)
member.summary: Gets or sets the build.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Rename.FeatureStepTextBuilder.TryBuildViaRegex(System.String,System.Text.RegularExpressions.Regex,System.String)
member.summary: Extracts captured parameter values by matching against and injects them into the parameter slots of . Returns null when the regex is absent, does not match, or yields no captures, so the caller can try another strategy.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Rename.FeatureStepTextBuilder.TryBuildViaStaticSegments(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Renames the static text of by replacing the literal segments of with those of , preserving the parameter regions (the text the step actually carries) verbatim. Returns null when the expressions cannot be aligned with the step text.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Rename.FeatureStepTextBuilder.TryBuildViaOutlinePlaceholders(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Detects Scenario Outline placeholders (⟨...⟩ tokens) in and maps them positionally onto the parameter slots of . This handles cases where both regex matching and static-segment alignment fail because the step text's literal content has been edited independently of the binding expression.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Rename.FeatureStepTextBuilder.DeriveExpressionFromEditedText(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Derives a new abstract expression from an in-place feature-file edit. and are the step's concrete text (no keyword) before and after the user's edit in the rename dialog; is the binding's current abstract expression. The parameter values are located in using 's static segments, then re-located verbatim in so the original parameter slots ({int}, a regex group, …) can be preserved around whatever static wording the user typed. Returns when a parameter value can no longer be found verbatim in the edited text — i.e. the user changed a parameter value rather than the step's wording, which this flow does not support.

member.name: M:Reqnroll.IdeSupport.LSP.Core.Rename.FeatureStepTextBuilder.ExtractOutlinePlaceholders(System.String)
member.summary: Extracts Scenario Outline placeholder values (e.g. {"<result>", "<secondNumber>"}) from in order.
